title: Better Than Beta
description: Beta+ Minecraft experience with a lot of optimizations and nice features!
body:
# About
**Better Than Beta brings you back to 2011!**

This modpack takes the new content, beta gameplay, beta friendly mods, custom resourcepack, lots of optimisations and makes your Minecraft experience inspiring again!
![1.2 out!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f45ac4e6ad397e3ad8abf573a9909d5a56757cd0.png)


#  Features
- **Custom resourcepack based on [Golden Days Base](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/golden-days) with a lot of amazing features including retexture of some mods**

- **A lot of optimisations and bug fixes!**

- **Beta 1.7.3 gameplay elements!**

- **Working LAN (and essentials) multiplayer!**

- **Dyeable planks and bricks!** 

- **Aether!**

- **Running without hunger system!** 

- **Beta 1.7.3 overworld generation and gorgeous amplified nether with new biomes!**
 
- **Old caves with additions!**

- **And other exiting Beta-friendly additions!**

![Thanks for playing!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3f8b1c5b7100790496d8af37cce288872c0c02bb.png)
### Thanks for playing! ❤️

## Feedback
### If you would like to share your opinion on this modpack, find parthners to play with, suggest something to add or fix, or even help with work on this project - join [Better Than Beta discord server!](https://discord.gg/pHbnyxMtKR)
